# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type PluginModule = Record<string, unknown>;

type LoadedPlugin = {
  specifier: string;
  url: string;
  mod: PluginModule;
};

const DEFAULT_ALLOWED_PREFIXES = [
  "https://deno.land/",
  "https://esm.sh/",
  "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/",
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/",
];

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  headers.set("cache-control", headers.get("cache-control") ?? "no-store");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), { ...init, headers });
}

function text(data: string, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  headers.set("cache-control", headers.get("cache-control") ?? "no-store");
  return new Response(data, { ...init, headers });
}

function isSafeProtocol(url: URL): boolean {
  return url.protocol === "https:" || url.protocol === "http:";
}

function normalizeAllowedPrefixes(raw: string | null): string[] {
  if (!raw) return [...DEFAULT_ALLOWED_PREFIXES];
  const parts = raw
    .split(/[,\n]/g)
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
  return parts.length ? parts : [...DEFAULT_ALLOWED_PREFIXES];
}

function parseEnvModuleList(): string[] {
  const env =
    Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") ??
    Deno.env.get("MODULES") ??
    Deno.env.get("PLUGINS") ??
    "";
  return env
    .split(/[,\n]/g)
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function parseQueryModuleList(url: URL): string[] {
  const values: string[] = [];

  for (const v of url.searchParams.getAll("module")) values.push(v);
  for (const v of url.searchParams.getAll("modules")) values.push(v);
  for (const v of url.searchParams.getAll("plugin")) values.push(v);
  for (const v of url.searchParams.getAll("plugins")) values.push(v);

  const list = url.searchParams.get("m") ?? url.searchParams.get("p") ?? url.searchParams.get("list");
  if (list) {
    for (const v of list.split(/[,\n]/g)) values.push(v);
  }

  return values.map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function resolveSpecifierToUrl(specifier: string, base: URL): URL {
  try {
    return new URL(specifier);
  } catch {
    return new URL(specifier, base);
  }
}

function allowedByPrefix(url: URL, allowedPrefixes: string[]): boolean {
  const href = url.href;
  return allowedPrefixes.some((p) => href.startsWith(p));
}

async function importPlugin(specifier: string, base: URL): Promise<LoadedPlugin> {
  const url = resolveSpecifierToUrl(specifier, base);
  const allowedPrefixes = normalizeAllowedPrefixes(Deno.env.get("ALLOWED_PLUGIN_PREFIXES"));

  if (!isSafeProtocol(url)) {
    throw new Error(`Blocked protocol: ${url.protocol}`);
  }
  if (!allowedByPrefix(url, allowedPrefixes)) {
    throw new Error(`Blocked by allowlist: ${url.href}`);
  }

  const mod = (await import(url.href)) as PluginModule;
  return { specifier, url: url.href, mod };
}

async function callHook(
  plugin: LoadedPlugin,
  hookName: string,
  req: Request,
  ctx: Record<string, unknown>,
): Promise<unknown> {
  const hook = plugin.mod[hookName];
  if (typeof hook === "function") {
    return await (hook as (req: Request, ctx: Record<string, unknown>) => unknown)(req, ctx);
  }
  if (typeof plugin.mod["default"] === "function") {
    return await (plugin.mod["default"] as (req: Request, ctx: Record<string, unknown>) => unknown)(req, ctx);
  }
  return null;
}

function getConfig(reqUrl: URL): {
  moduleSpecifiers: string[];
  includeEnv: boolean;
  hook: string;
} {
  const includeEnv = (reqUrl.searchParams.get("env") ?? "1") !== "0";
  const hook = (reqUrl.searchParams.get("hook") ?? "handle").trim() || "handle";

  const qModules = parseQueryModuleList(reqUrl);
  const envModules = includeEnv ? parseEnvModuleList() : [];
  const moduleSpecifiers = [...qModules, ...envModules];

  const seen = new Set<string>();
  const unique = moduleSpecifiers.filter((s) => (seen.has(s) ? false : (seen.add(s), true)));

  return { moduleSpecifiers: unique, includeEnv, hook };
}

function isLikelyModuleSpecifier(s: string): boolean {
  if (!s) return false;
  if (s.length > 2048) return false;
  return true;
}

serve(async (req: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const reqUrl = new URL(req.url);

  if (reqUrl.pathname === "/") {
    return json({
      ok: true,
      endpoints: {
        load: "/load?module=<url>[&module=<url>...]",
        run: "/run?module=<url>[&hook=handle]",
        config: "/config",
      },
      env: {
        PLUGIN_MODULES: "comma/newline separated module specifiers (URLs or relative paths)",
        ALLOWED_PLUGIN_PREFIXES: "comma/newline separated URL prefixes allowlist",
      },
      allowlist: normalizeAllowedPrefixes(Deno.env.get("ALLOWED_PLUGIN_PREFIXES")),
    });
  }

  if (reqUrl.pathname === "/config") {
    return json({
      allowlist: normalizeAllowedPrefixes(Deno.env.get("ALLOWED_PLUGIN_PREFIXES")),
      envModules: parseEnvModuleList(),
    });
  }

  const { moduleSpecifiers, hook } = getConfig(reqUrl);

  if (reqUrl.pathname === "/load") {
    const results: Array<
      | { specifier: string; url?: string; ok: true; exports: string[] }
      | { specifier: string; ok: false; error: string }
    > = [];

    for (const specifier of moduleSpecifiers) {
      if (!isLikelyModuleSpecifier(specifier)) {
        results.push({ specifier, ok: false, error: "Invalid module specifier" });
        continue;
      }
      try {
        const loaded = await importPlugin(specifier, reqUrl);
        results.push({
          specifier,
          url: loaded.url,
          ok: true,
          exports: Object.keys(loaded.mod ?? {}),
        });
      } catch (e) {
        results.push({ specifier, ok: false, error: String(e?.message ?? e) });
      }
    }

    return json({
      ok: true,
      count: results.length,
      hook,
      results,
    });
  }

  if (reqUrl.pathname === "/run") {
    const ctx: Record<string, unknown> = {
      url: req.url,
      method: req.method,
      hook,
      time: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    const executions: Array<
      | { specifier: string; url?: string; ok: true; result: unknown }
      | { specifier: string; ok: false; error: string }
    > = [];

    for (const specifier of moduleSpecifiers) {
      if (!isLikelyModuleSpecifier(specifier)) {
        executions.push({ specifier, ok: false, error: "Invalid module specifier" });
        continue;
      }
      try {
        const plugin = await importPlugin(specifier, reqUrl);
        const result = await callHook(plugin, hook, req, ctx);
        executions.push({ specifier, url: plugin.url, ok: true, result });
      } catch (e) {
        executions.push({ specifier, ok: false, error: String(e?.message ?? e) });
      }
    }

    return json({
      ok: true,
      hook,
      plugins: executions,
    });
  }

  if (reqUrl.pathname === "/healthz") {
    return text("ok");
  }

  return json(
    {
      ok: false,
      error: "Not found",
      routes: ["/", "/config", "/load", "/run", "/healthz"],
    },
    { status: 404 },
  );
});
